config.task: Coordinate all agents working on Al Binaa Construction website (Next.js 14, static export, bilingual EN/AR, deployed on Railway at https://web-production-9334f.up.railway.app). Oversee SEO, performance, code quality, and production validation tasks.

Monitor and improve SEO for Al Binaa Construction website. Track: title tags (all under 60 chars), meta descriptions, canonical URLs, hreflang EN/AR, structured data (LocalBusiness + Organization schema), Core Web Vitals on Railway deployment. Report issues and recommendations.

Audit performance of Al Binaa Next.js 14 static site. Check: bundle sizes, image optimization (WebP/AVIF), LCP/CLS/INP scores, font loading (preload strategy), lazy loading implementation, build output size vs threshold. Flag any regressions.

Review Al Binaa codebase quality. Focus: Next.js 14 best practices, next-intl bilingual patterns, TypeScript strictness, component reuse, inline-style consistency vs DESIGN.md, accessibility (alt text, aria-labels, focus states, RTL support), and any dead code.

Validate Al Binaa production deployment at https://web-production-9334f.up.railway.app. Check: all 8 static routes (en/ar x home/about/services/projects/contact) return 200, security headers present (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options), no console errors, bilingual switching works, quote form submits correctly.

Improve Al Binaa website content and copy. Tasks: review English/Arabic translations for construction industry accuracy, flag any placeholder or thin content, suggest missing pages (e.g. individual project detail pages, blog/news section), improve call-to-action copy strength.

Research Al Binaa competitors in Oman construction market. Identify top 5 construction company websites in Muscat/Oman. Compare: SEO positioning, service offerings, design quality, trust signals, content depth. Report gaps Al Binaa can exploit.
